message: {"confidence":0.93,"approve_auto_apply":false,"reasons":["Assertion drift classifier explicitly blocked auto-healing: auto_heal_assertion_allowed=false and human_review_required=true.","Diff modifies assertion behavior in pages/base-page.ts assertVisible by adding scroll fallback and a 10000ms visibility timeout, which is an assertion-related update and must be rejected under the gate.","Patch is not minimal: it changes shared base click/assertion behavior, overlay dismissal, logout flow, and link validation/navigation behavior across three page objects.","The logout fallback navigates directly to /logout, which is a behavioral workaround rather than a narrow selector or timing repair.","The overview-page change falls back to direct navigation when a visible link cannot be clicked, which may bypass the user interaction being tested."],"risks":["Could mask a real product regression where /en/shop-online is hidden or unavailable.","Could convert failing click/link behavior into passing navigation behavior without validating the UI path.","Shared base-page changes may affect many unrelated specs beyond the failed case.","Direct logout-route navigation may hide menu visibility, session, or routing defects.","Added catch-and-continue fallbacks reduce failure signal quality and may make future failures harder to diagnose."]}
ai_raw: {"confidence":0.93,"approve_auto_apply":false,"reasons":["Assertion drift classifier explicitly blocked auto-healing: auto_heal_assertion_allowed=false and human_review_required=true.","Diff modifies assertion behavior in pages/base-page.ts assertVisible by adding scroll fallback and a 10000ms visibility timeout, which is an assertion-related update and must be rejected under the gate.","Patch is not minimal: it changes shared base click/assertion behavior, overlay dismissal, logout flow, and link validation/navigation behavior across three page objects.","The logout fallback navigates directly to /logout, which is a behavioral workaround rather than a narrow selector or timing repair.","The overview-page change falls back to direct navigation when a visible link cannot be clicked, which may bypass the user interaction being tested."],"risks":["Could mask a real product regression where /en/shop-online is hidden or unavailable.","Could convert failing click/link behavior into passing navigation behavior without validating the UI path.","Shared base-page changes may affect many unrelated specs beyond the failed case.","Direct logout-route navigation may hide menu visibility, session, or routing defects.","Added catch-and-continue fallbacks reduce failure signal quality and may make future failures harder to diagnose."]}
